title: Rulemaking
doc_html:
§1455. Rulemaking

            The department shall promulgate in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act all such rules as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 2022, No. 561, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
doc_text:
§1455.  Rulemaking
The department shall promulgate in accordance with the Administrative Procedure
Act all such rules as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 2022, No. 561, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
